name: Hunter Shark

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.text: The shark can breathe only underwater.

text:
# Hunter Shark

*Large Beast, Unaligned*

A deep-reef predator built of muscle and appetite.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn’t have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.
